human_review_notes.finding: Billing/settings forms need a stronger instruction to implement explicit validation/error states, not only focus and disabled states.
human_review_notes.suggested_change: Add a compact rule under Empty, Loading, And Error States or Components: forms with editable payment/billing/destructive settings must include at least one visible validation error path.

human_review_notes.finding: The local skill did well, but the billing output still used a visible accent cancel action. It passed because it was quiet, but the rule could be sharper.
human_review_notes.suggested_change: Clarify that initial destructive entry points should usually be outline/secondary until the confirmation step.

human_review_notes.finding: The current eval set is largely static-file inspectable. Add screenshot-based grading if browser automation becomes available.
human_review_notes.suggested_change: Add screenshot assertions for first viewport hierarchy, text contrast, and mobile wrapping.

human_review_notes.finding: All three skills passed the hotel landing page assertions, so the eval may not be discriminating enough for art direction quality.
human_review_notes.suggested_change: Add a stronger visual taste rubric or ask for two art-directed variants and grade composition, image specificity, and copy originality.

recommended_skill_patch: Keep current app-vs-landing split; it performed well across both classes.
